info.title: Update dependencies with ncu and bun

diffs.patch:
Index: package.json
===================================================================
--- package.json	
+++ package.json	
@@ -1,88 +1,88 @@
 {
   "name": "bestcodes.dev",
   "version": "1.9.0",
   "private": true,
   "scripts": {
     "dev": "next dev --turbopack",
     "build": "npm run cache-generation && next build --turbopack && npm run sitemap-generation",
     "sitemap-generation": "rm -rf public/sitemap*.xml public/robots.txt && next-sitemap",
     "cache-generation": "npm run cache:blog-slugs",
     "cache:blog-slugs": "rm -rf .blog-cache && mkdir .blog-cache && node scripts/generate-slugs.mjs",
     "start": "next start",
     "lint": "bunx oxlint .",
     "drizzle-kit": "drizzle-kit",
     "update-deps": "bun update --latest",
     "blog-key": "node scripts/generate-blog-key.mjs"
   },
   "dependencies": {
     "@fuma-comment/react": "^1.4.1",
     "@fuma-comment/server": "^1.4.1",
     "@hookform/resolvers": "^5.2.2",

parts.text:
✅ **All TypeScript compilation commands completed successfully!** 

After clearing the Next.js cache (`.next` directory), all three commands ran without any errors:

1. **`bun tsc -b`** - TypeScript build mode ✅
2. **`bun tsc --noEmit`** - TypeScript type checking without emitting files ✅  
3. **`bun tsc -b --noEmit`** - TypeScript build mode without emitting files ✅

The initial errors were caused by a stale Next.js cache that contained outdated type validation files from before the dependency updates. Clearing the `.next` directory resolved the issue, and now all TypeScript compilation commands are passing successfully!
